rows.interpretation_risk: Conservative: only the strict positional prefix of each input flows to the next-positioned output. Per-output taint can be zero even if the tx has tainted inputs.
Proportional: every output receives a fraction of the input taint pool equal to its share of total output value. Rounding pennies go to the fee.
Maximalist: any tainted input marks every output as fully tainted. Inflation grows as un-tainted inputs join descendant txs.

note: Topology (set of UTXOs visited) is identical across the three conventions for this dataset because the dust-pruning threshold (1 BTC) is below the smallest tainted amount under every convention. At a higher dust threshold, poison would visit additional descendants because of its inflation.
